arts.ttl: Carlisle United confirm timing of season ticket decision
arts.sum: Carlisle United say they will not make a decision on season ticket prices and plans until they know what division they will be in next term.

arts.ttl: In pictures: Carlisle United fans at the Walsall game!
arts.sum: GALLERY: Check out Richard Parkes' brilliant fan photos as 6,378 watched Carlisle United's 1-1 draw with leaders Walsall at Brunton Park.

arts.ttl: Hughes on Carlisle United's bid to break Harrogate jinx
arts.sum: Mark Hughes says records are there to be broken as Carlisle United bid to break their Harrogate Town duck this weekend.

arts.ttl: Harrogate 'depleted' by illness as they prepare for Carlisle United
arts.sum: Harrogate Town boss Simon Weaver has said his squad is seriously depleted by illness as they prepare to face Carlisle United.

Harrogate's 0-0 draw with Port Vale on Tuesday night was their second game without defeat, and they have now just lost once in their last three games. Carlisle's 1-1 draw with Walsall on Tuesday nigh...

arts.ttl: Latest on Harper and other injury news at Carlisle United
arts.sum: Mark Hughes says he will leave a decision on Cameron Harper’s fitness as late as possible before Carlisle United’s trip to Harrogate Town this weekend.
